examples: The advert was trying to "show the ugliness of the illness, not of aids victims", he added.
No doubt we will remember a 20th century way of life beyond comprehension for its ugliness.
Nor the trip to Michelin-starred La Madia through the weird, industrial ugliness of Gela.
His ugliness was subtle: it took you a moment to realize, and fully appreciate, its scope.
"An indescribable conglomeration of beauty and ugliness, " the late San Francisco columnist Herb Caen once wrote.
